hero.description: ZISKovač automates the transition from gut-feeling pricing to data-driven profitability. Know your real costs, set the right rates, and generate professional quotes — in minutes.

about.headline: The Profitability Gap is real — and it's costing you.
about.body: Freelancers and micro-SMEs often feel like they're doing well — staying busy, sending invoices, serving clients. But without proper cost accounting and rate calculation, many unknowingly work at a loss.
about.pain1Desc: Most freelancers price only their time — ignoring software, taxes, downtime, and equipment.
about.pain2Desc: Quoting from instinct means inconsistent margins. Some projects profit, others quietly lose money.
about.pain3Desc: You work hard, invoices go out — but your bank account doesn't reflect your effort.

howItWorks.headline: From gut-feeling to data-driven in 4 steps
howItWorks.subheadline: ZISKovač gives you a clear, repeatable system for pricing profitably. No spreadsheets. No guessing.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Add your monthly overhead: software subscriptions, equipment, taxes, desired salary, and non-billable hours.
howItWorks.step2Desc: ZISKovač calculates the minimum viable rate you need to charge to actually profit — not just survive.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Create itemized quotes for clients in seconds. Every line item is linked to your real cost data.
howItWorks.step4Desc: See exactly how much you're making per project, per client, and per month — at a glance.

pricing.headline: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.starterDesc: Perfect for solo freelancers just getting started.
pricing.proDesc: For serious freelancers who want full profitability control.

faq.headline: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: ZISKovač is built for freelancers, solo consultants, and micro-SMEs (1–10 people) who want to price their services profitably and generate professional quotes without complex accounting software.
faq.q2: Do I need accounting knowledge to use it?
faq.a2: Not at all. ZISKovač is designed to be intuitive. You enter plain numbers — your monthly expenses, desired income, working hours — and the app does the math for you.
faq.q3: How does the pricing calculator work?
faq.a3: You input all your real costs (overhead, subscriptions, taxes, non-billable hours) and your desired take-home income. ZISKovač calculates the minimum hourly or daily rate you must charge to be profitable.
faq.q4: Can I generate quotes for clients?
faq.a4: Yes! With the Pro and Business plans, you can generate branded PDF quotes linked to your real cost data. Clients receive a professional document; you see your actual margin on every line.
faq.a5: Yes. All data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We never share your business data with third parties. You can export or delete your data at any time.
faq.q6: Can I try it before paying?
faq.a6: Absolutely. The Starter plan is free forever. Pro and Business plans offer a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

cta.headline: Ready to close the profitability gap?
cta.subheadline: Join hundreds of freelancers who stopped undercharging and started building sustainable businesses.
cta.button: Start for Free — No Credit Card Required

step1.title: Welcome, {{name}}! 👋
step1.description: Let's set up your profitability model. First — what's your monthly income goal?
step1.incomeHint: Your desired take-home before expenses and taxes.

step2.title: What are your monthly costs?
step2.description: Add your fixed overhead. We'll factor these into your minimum rate.

step3.title: How much can you bill?
step3.description: How many hours per month do you expect to bill clients?

step4.title: You're all set!
